item.title: They are SUCH hypocrites, if u wanna stand against antisemitism, I’ll stand arm in arm with you, but that starts with the predom...
item.description:
They are SUCH hypocrites, if u wanna stand against antisemitism, I’ll stand arm in arm with you, but that starts with the predominate and despicable antisemetic ideology of Zionism



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: At this point I’m tired of pointing out that fascist dems are in fact… fascist
item.description:
At this point I’m tired of pointing out that fascist dems are in fact… fascist. But Jesus Christ they keep showing up and being the most annoying ppl ever



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is exactly what birthright is: make jam, justify imperialism
item.description:
This is exactly what birthright is: make jam, justify imperialism. It’s a gross but effective form of normalization and deep propaganda

item.title: Hi, you are on their land
item.description:
Hi, you are on their land. The least you could do is pronounce the name of it properly.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: PLEASE STIP MAKING TW*NK AS SLUR I WANNA BE ABLE TO USE IT IN POLITE SOCIETY
